name: opencode_not_installed_graceful
expr: (lambda r: r[0] is False and 'opencode' in r[2])(run_opencode('test', __import__('pathlib').Path('/tmp'), timeout=5))

name: run_dispatch_opencode
expr: (lambda r: r[0] is False and r[2] == 'opencode')(run('opencode','prompt','m',__import__('pathlib').Path('/tmp'),'http://x','k'))
